visual_description: A medium close-up shot focuses on an older Asian man with short, graying hair, wearing a black collared shirt. He is in a dimly lit, opulent room, possibly a grand hall or a wealthy residence. In the background, a large, out-of-focus golden chandelier and dark wood paneling are visible, creating a rich and formal atmosphere. The camera remains static, keeping the man as the central point of focus. In the top left corner of the screen, there is a watermark with Chinese characters. He holds a phone to his right ear, listening intently with a serious and slightly concerned expression. A man speaks in a low, serious, and slightly hushed tone, as if giving a confidential report. His voice is steady and matter-of-fact as he states, "今天杀那警察的时候，那批货已经收了。" (When they killed that policeman today, that batch of goods had already been collected.) The background is quiet, with no music or other distracting sounds, emphasizing the gravity of his words. The man then begins to speak into the phone, his expression becoming more animated and determined. He gestures subtly with his free hand, which is also near his face.
